_comment: HTTP 400. The API fetches every image_url at submit time and fails the submit synchronously if any URL is unreachable. (It does NOT defer this to the polling stage.) Implication for Flowboard: image hosting must be live before the submit call, not just before the poll succeeds.

error.message: The parameter `content[1].image_url` specified in the request is not valid: resource download failed. Request id: 021779375573928378c141953f92ec627da9d675fe03be08c6d5c
